rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Office Products Spawning WMI (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Office Products Spawning WMI (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 6335a2c2-5339-443a-b00c-ebffc9ffc321
status: experimental
description: Detects MS Office applications spawning WMI processes. Part of the RedCanary
  2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \winword.exe
    - \excel.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \wmic.exe
    - \wmiprvse.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
